overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark, rain-soaked industrial alleyway at night. The scene features derelict buildings with metal scaffolding and fire escapes, debris-strewn ground, and heavy rainfall creating a moody, atmospheric environment typical of a survival horror video game.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict industrial alley with chain-link fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked industrial alley, passing by a chain-link fence and debris piles on the right side

entered.detail: tall dark industrial structure with metal scaffolding and pipes
weathered industrial building with external metal fire escape stairs
rusted metal walkway bridge connecting the two buildings overhead
chain-link security fence running along the right side of the alley
building with illuminated windows visible at the end of the alley passage
scattered rubble and discarded materials along the alley floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked industrial alleyway at night. The camera moves forward past a chain-link fence on the right, between two tall industrial buildings connected by an overhead metal catwalk. Heavy rain falls through the partial opening above, illuminating the debris-strewn dirt ground. In the distance, a building with lit windows provides the only light source in the gloomy passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial passage with overhead scaffolding

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper into the alleyway, approaching the distant building with illuminated windows while passing under the overhead metal structure

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward through the industrial alley, having passed the chain-link fence. The buildings on both sides now appear closer and more imposing, with the overhead metal catwalk dominating the center of the frame. The distant building with illuminated windows draws nearer as the camera advances through the persistent heavy rain, with debris scattered across the dirt ground remaining visible throughout the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a gloomy, rain-soaked industrial alleyway that draws closer to a distant source of light. It begins by gliding past a chain-link fence between two towering industrial buildings, where heavy rain falls through an overhead metal catwalk onto the debris-strewn dirt ground. As the camera advances, the surrounding walls feel increasingly imposing and the metal structure above begins to dominate the frame. The scene then shifts in perspective as the distant building with illuminated windows grows larger and more prominent, pulling the viewer deeper into the persistent downpour.
